channel.title: Naija Digest Online
channel.description: Nigeria’s one-stop hub for breaking news, tech, football, celebrity gossip, Naija music, live TV, exchange rates and trending topics.

item.title: I borrowed N400m paid for PFIPC appointment – ‘Fake’ Agency DG
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
The ‘fake’ DG of PFIPC, Adeniyi Adeyemi, claims he borrowed N400m for his appointment and his lenders have petitioned the EFCC for a refund.
Read More: https://punchng.com/i-borrowed-n400m-paid-for-pfipc-appointment-fake-agency-dg/

item.title: Brazil opens market to Nigerian shea butter, hibiscus, sesame exports
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Nigeria and Brazil strengthen ties as Brazil opens its market to Nigerian exports of shea butter, hibiscus, and sesame, boosting agro-trade.
Read More: https://punchng.com/brazil-opens-market-to-nigerian-shea-butter-hibiscus-sesame-exports/

item.title: Dangote fixes petrol price at $0.779 per litre in new pricing template
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Dangote Refinery sets petrol price at $0.779 per litre, shifting to dollar-denominated transactions. This move impacts Nigeria’s fuel pricing dynamics.
Read More: https://punchng.com/dangote-fixes-petrol-price-at-0-779-per-litre-in-new-pricing-template/

item.title: We’ve taken over rescued teachers, pupils’ welfare – Makinde

item.description:
Oyo State Governor Seyi Makinde announces the state will take full responsibility for the welfare of rescued Oriire teachers and pupils after 56 days in ca
Read More: https://punchng.com/weve-taken-over-rescued-teachers-pupils-welfare-makinde/

item.title: 2026 World Cup: Rodri sends strong message ahead of France showdown
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: Spain midfielder Rodri has called on his teammates to rely on their strengths when they take on France in the World Cup semi-final on Tuesday. The post 2026 World Cup: Rodri sends strong message ahead of France showdown appeared first on The Sun Nigeria.

item.title: Makinde to UN: Investigate Oyo school abduction, rescue operation
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: "The Nigerian people therefore deserve a full, transparent and credible account of what happened, who was responsible, whether there were institutional failures, negligence or collusion at any level, and what measures must now be taken to ensure that no community is ever subjected to such a tragedy

item.title: Appeal Court verdict: Don’t lose sleep, Atiku tells ADC supporters
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: Former Vice President Atiku Abubakar has urged members of the African Democratic Congress (ADC) and The post Appeal Court verdict: Don’t lose sleep, Atiku tells ADC supporters appeared first on Tribune Online.

item.title: Trump reinstates Iran port blockade and imposes 20% charge on cargo passing through Hormuz
item.dc:creator: BBC News World
item.description: The US president also says Washington will impose a 20% charge on all cargo shipped through the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: NPFL: Ogunmodede sets agenda on squad building at Kano Pillars
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: Kano Pillars technical adviser, Daniel Ogunmodede has made his selection plans clear ahead of the 2026-27 season. Ogunmodede says that discipline and commitment will outweigh raw talents in his squad. The 46-year-old resumed work at the four-time NPFL champions on Sunday. Ogunmodede is expected to f

item.title: Defence Ministry Blames Unpaid House Officers’ Allowances On Lack Of 2026 Budget Provision
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: Ministry of Defence has explained that the non payments of allowances to house officers and Interns attached to Armed Forces Reference Hospitals nationwide is due to non budgetary allocation in 2026. The Permanent Secretary of the Ministry Mr Richard Pheelangwah gave the explanation in a statement h

item.title: European Bank reaffirms commitment to investment in Nigeria
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: The European Bank for Reconstruction and Development (EBRD) has reaffirmed its commitment to making Nigeria an investment destination. This commitment came as the Minister of Finance and Coordinating Minister of the Economy, Taiwo Oyedele, visited the newly established Nigeria Country Office of the

item.title: Apple says former employee exploited ‘rare’ bug to download confidential files after leaving for OpenAI
item.dc:creator: TechCrunch
item.description: Apple would not comment on the "security breach," which allegedly allowed a former employee to download sensitive files from Apple's network long after he departed the company for rival OpenAI.

item.title: Twelve US states sue Paramount to block Warner Bros merger
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: The states claim the $110bn acquisition would limit competition in the TV and film industries.

item.title: Cost Of Import Duty Exemptions Hit ₦34 Trillion In 2025, Says Customs

item.description: Customs explained that government fiscal policies have continued to impact the revenue-generating capacity of the Service. The post Cost Of Import Duty Exemptions Hit ₦34 Trillion In 2025, Says Customs appeared first on Channels Television.

item.title: Nigeria, Brazil Shift From Agreements to Implementation in Agro-Trade Partnership — Shettima
item.dc:creator: TVC News
item.description: Vice President Kashim Shettima says Nigeria and Brazil have moved beyond diplomatic engagements to the implementation phase of their bilateral agro-trade partnership, paving the way for private sector operators in both countries to begin trading in key agricultural commodities. item.title: SpaceX’s stock threatens to fall below the IPO price. Do investors face a ‘crisis’ if it does?
item.dc:creator: MarketWatch
item.description: The company has shed more than $800 billion in market value from its $2.67 trillion peak in less than a month.

item.title: Terrorists won’t stop education in Oyo State – Makinde
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: Oyo State Governor, Engr. Seyi Makinde, on Monday, declared that terrorists and kidnappers would not be allowed to derail the education of children or destroy the careers of teachers in the state, as he pledged full government support for pupils and teachers rescued after spending 56 days in captivi

item.description:

item.title: World Cup 2026: Lamine Yamal names two best teams at tournament
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: Barcelona winger, Lamine Yamal, has named Spain and France as the two best teams at the World Cup. The Spain international spoke at his pre-match interview ahead of La Roja’s World Cup semi-final fixture with France on Tuesday. Spain and France head to the game after beating Belgium and Morocc

item.title: FCT: Two siblings, woman docked over Guzape murder of father
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: Three persons, including two siblings, have been arraigned before a Federal Capital Territory High Court over the alleged murder of Adimike Godwin in the Guzape District of Abuja, more than two months after he was found dead in his residence with multiple stab wounds. The defendants, Adimike Odirach

item.title: World Cup 2026: Rodri makes demand ahead of France clash
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: Spain midfielder Rodri has urged his team to play to their strength when they face France in the World Cup semi-final fixture on Tuesday. According to the Manchester City star, France are a great side, and La Roja are motivated to conquer them. “France will probably be our toughest test,” Rodri

item.title: UK arrests 12 over extreme right-wing ‘terror’ threat to Muslim event
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: Arrests come against a backdrop of rising racial tensions and hate crimes across Britain.

item.title: Gunmen kill AAU student, abduct palace secretary, four others in Edo
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: The undergraduate, whose identity had yet to be confirmed at the time of filing this report, was reportedly abducted alongside a woman after gunmen invaded his residence in Ekpoma on Sunday night.

item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: Kano State governor, Abba Kabir Yusuf, has announced the nomination of his deputy, Murtala Sule Galadima Garo, as his running mate for the 2027 governorship election. The announcement was made during a strategic meeting with Federal Political Appointees of President Bola Ahmed Tinubu at the Kano Gov

item.title: EFCC Arraigns CEO Over Alleged N16.8m Dud Cheque Fraud in Enugu
item.dc:creator: TVC News
item.description: The Economic and Financial Crimes Commission (EFCC) has arraigned the Chief Executive Officer of Ski Hi-Entertainment, Ifeanyichukwu Ogbu, before the Enugu State High Court over an alleged N16.847 million fraud involving the issuance of dud cheques. Ogbu was docked before Justice Vincent C. Ezeugwu

The operation, led by the chairman of the taskf

The market comprises 3 blocks containing lock-up stores, 28 open sheds with 378 partitions and 6 multipurpose sheds withou

item.description: The week is kicking off with fresh spikes for oil prices after President Donald Trump reimposed the naval blockage on the Strait of Hormuz.

In a heartfelt post on social media, Nwelue recounted telling Soyinka that his knee surger

item.title: Kano Court Remands Woman Over Alleged Murder Of Co-wife
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: A Chief Magistrate’s Court in Kano has remanded a 20-year-old woman, Safiya Hussaini, in a correctional facility over the alleged murder of her co-wife. Safiya, a resident of Loko village in Takai Local Government Area of Kano State, was arraigned on Monday before Chief Magistrate Court No. 2,

item.description: A deluge of hyperscaler debt creates risk that investors will run up against concentration limits in their portfolios from a single company or industry.

item.title: Dutch referee dies weeks after being dropped from World Cup
item.dc:creator: BBC Sport Football
item.description: Dutch football referee Rob Dieperink dies aged 38, weeks after he was dropped from officiating at the World Cup because of a police investigation in the UK.

item.title: BREAKING: 60-Year-Old Oyo Headmaster Regains Freedom 48 Hours After N5m Ransom Payment
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: The 60-year-old abducted headmaster of Nomadic Basic School, Igbojaye, in Itesiwaju Local Government Area of Oyo State, Mr. Mathew Kolawole Owoade, popularly known as Onaiye, has regained his freedom after spending 48 hours in captivity. The headmaster was released at about 6:00 p.m. on Monday. The

item.title: Spanish PM visits site of deadly wildfire

item.description: Spain’s Prime Minister, Pedro Sanchez met with firefighters and emergency crews who battled a wildfire in Almeria.

item.title: Oil prices jump 9% to $82.90 on worsening US-Iran conflict

item.description: Oil prices shot up around nine percent Monday as President Donald Trump announced the reimposition of a US naval blockade on Iranian ports while the two sides traded attacks. The post Oil prices jump 9% to $82.90 on worsening US-Iran conflict appeared first on Vanguard News.

item.title: O’Neill Confirms New Celtic Contract For Iheanacho
item.dc:creator: Completesports
item.description: Celtic manager Martin O’Neill has confirmed that the Hoops have made Kelechi Iheanacho an offer as talks continue over the striker’s return to the club, Completesports.com reports. Iheanacho’s previous contract with Celtic expired at the end of last month. Iheanacho linked up with the Ho

item.title: NNL: Crown FC announce screening to discover new players
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: Crown FC have concluded plans to begin an open screening exercise for the selection of new players ahead of the new season. The Ajilete Warriors disclosed this in a statement signed by Oyebowale Adetayo on behalf of the club. According to the statement, the screening exercise will commence on M

item.title: 2026 World Cup: Messi opens up on first-ever meeting with England
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: Argentina captain Lionel Messi believes his side's World Cup semi-final showdown with England will be a memorable occasion, describing the fixture as one of the biggest matches of the tournament. The post 2026 World Cup: Messi opens up on first-ever meeting with England appeared first on The Sun Nig

item.title: YNaija Daily Recap | Top Headlines Today
item.dc:creator: YNaija
item.description: ADC Rejects Appeal Court Ruling, Heads to Supreme Court The African Democratic Congress (ADC) has rejected a Court of Appeal judgment relating to its internal party congresses, insisting that the ruling does not affect its direct primaries or the emergence of candidates for the 2027 general election

item.title: Makinde Receives Oyo Abductees, Promises To Take Charge Of Their Care, Rehabilitation
item.dc:creator: Channels TV
item.description: Makinde formally announced that the state government had assumed responsibility for the continued welfare of all the rescued teachers and pupils. The post Makinde Receives Oyo Abductees, Promises To Take Charge Of Their Care, Rehabilitation appeared first on Channels Television.

item.title: ‘It’s heartbreaking’: My brother claimed Social Security at 70. He died from cancer after one payment. Why wait to claim?
item.dc:creator: MarketWatch
item.description: “I’ve always been a little skeptical of the government’s encouragement to delay claiming benefits.”

item.title: Police probe death of South Africa World Cup star Jayden Adams
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: Father of the deceased, Juanito Adams, said the family was awaiting the outcome of an autopsy before making funeral arrangements. The post Police probe death of South Africa World Cup star Jayden Adams appeared first on Vanguard News.

item.title: UK designates IRGC as terrorist organisation
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: The UK government has designated Iran’s Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) as a terrorist organisation under new powers.

item.title: Joint security operation launched to rescue abducted Oyo farmer
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: The Oyo State Police Command has launched a joint security operation to rescue a farmer, Mr. Owoade Mathew, who was abducted on his farm in Igbojaye Community, and to arrest the perpetrators. The post Joint security operation launched to rescue abducted Oyo farmer appeared first on The Sun Nigeria.

item.title: PFIPC scandal: Adeyemi rejects ICPC probe, demands independent panel
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: Adeniyi Adeyemi, who claims to be the director-general of the disputed Presidential Foreign Investment Promotion Council (PFIPC), has rejected the Federal Government's decision to allow The post PFIPC scandal: Adeyemi rejects ICPC probe, demands independent panel appeared first on Tribune Online.

item.title: What is the update on Karim Adeyemi's move to Barcelona?
item.dc:creator: NotJustOk
item.description: Barcelona president Joan Laporta has publicly confirmed that the Catalan giants are set to complete the signing of Borussia Dortmund winger Karim Adeyemi. Speaking while attending the 2026 FIFA World Cup in Dallas, Laporta expressed his delight over the deal, revealing that Barcelona had been monito

item.title: China hosts Second Meeting of Political, Diplomatic Sub-Committee of China-Nigeria Intergovernmental Committee
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: The Chinese Government, has hosted in Beijing, China, the Second Meeting of the Political and Diplomatic Sub-Committee of the China-Nigeria Intergovernmental Committee. The post China hosts Second Meeting of Political, Diplomatic Sub-Committee of China-Nigeria Intergovernmental Committee appeared fi

item.title: Lagos resident praises emergency responders for saving seven-month-old daughter
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: "My seven-month-old daughter developed a high fever after battling an elevated temperature for two days. When the thermometer read 38.5°C, panic set in. With heavy rain falling and no means of transportation, my wife and I tried to bring the fever down by gently wiping her with a wet towel while wai

item.title: Vet Konect hosts first ever African animal health AI Summit
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: In recognition that Artificial Intelligence (AI) is rapidly transforming industries across the world, veterinary medicine inclusive, Vet Konect, a digital animal health company in partnership with Nova Vet family, a Dubai based company, has successfully hosted the maiden African Animal Health AI Sum

item.title: Ayo Adeyemi Congratulates Muiz Banire on Julius Berger’s Board Appointment
item.dc:creator: ThisDay
item.description: A respected management consultant, leadership development expert, Director of BQ Consulting and President of the AA Mentor Foundation, Dr. Ayo Adeyemi, has extended his warmest congratulations to distinguished legal luminary and

item.title: State Police: Tinubu prioritising Nigerians’ safety, not his re-election – Sen Kalu
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: The Senator representing Abia North, Orji Kalu, has dismissed claims that President Bola Tinubu’s push for the establishment of state police is driven by political considerations ahead of the 2027 general election, saying the President’s motivation is the safety of Nigerians. The post State Police:

item.title: 🔴 Ukraine orders 16 Rafale jets, announces new anti-ballistic missile coalition in Paris
item.dc:creator: France 24

item.title: Test Your ETF Knowledge In Our IQ Test
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: Bloomberg's Joel Weber puts Scarlet Fu, Katie Greifeld, and Eric Balchunas to the test on "Bloomberg ETF IQ" in this week's edition of "IQ Test." (Source: Bloomberg)

item.title: Appeal Court bars INEC from recognising Mark-led ADC congresses
item.dc:creator: Nairametrics
item.description: The Court of Appeal in Abuja on Monday restrained the Independent National Electoral Commission (INEC) from recognising state congresses organised by committees appointed by the David Mark-led caretaker leadership of the African Democratic Congress (ADC). The post Appeal Court bars INEC from recogni
